title: selaginella negrosensis
intro: Selaginella negrosensis is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella negrosensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. It can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
